languages.text: "Сержант, ты нужен своему полку. Моя смерть не повлияет на вашу судьбу. Твоя — да. Уходи".
"Sergeant, your regiment needs you. My death will not affect its fate. Yours will. Go."
languages.original_text: "Сержант, ты нужен своему полку. Моя смерть не повлияет на вашу судьбу. Твоя — да. Уходи".

traits.locale_text: "Sergeant, your regiment needs you. My death will not affect its fate. Yours will. Go."
"Sergeant, your regiment needs you. My death will not affect its fate. Yours will. Go."
"Sergeant, your regiment needs you. My death will not affect its fate. Yours will. Go."

languages.text: 「大尉、あなたの連隊はあなたを必要としている。私の死は連隊の運命に影響を与えない。あなたの死は影響を与える。行って」
languages.original_text: "Sergeant, your regiment needs you. My death will not affect its fate. Yours will. Go."

traits.locale_text: 「大尉、あなたの連隊はあなたを必要としている。私の死は連隊の運命に影響を与えない。あなたの死は影響を与える。行って。」

languages.text: "Çavuş, alayının sana ihtiyacı var. Benim ölümüm alayın kaderini etkilemez, seninkiyse etkiler. Git."
languages.original_text: "Sergeant, your regiment needs you. My death will not affect its fate. Yours will. Go."

traits.locale_text: "Çavuş, alayının sana ihtiyacı var. Benim ölümüm alayın kaderini etkilemez, seninkiyse etkiler. Git."

languages.text: «Sargento, su regimiento le necesita. Mi muerte no cambiará su destino. La suya sí. Vuelva con ellos».
languages.original_text: "Sergeant, your regiment needs you. My death will not affect its fate. Yours will. Go."

traits.locale_text: «Sargento, su regimiento le necesita. Mi muerte no cambiará su destino. La suya sí. Vuelva con ellos».

languages.text: “军士，你的军团需要你。我死不会影响军团的命运，但你不一样。走吧。”
languages.original_text: "Sergeant, your regiment needs you. My death will not affect its fate. Yours will. Go."

traits.locale_text: “军士，你的军团需要你。我死不会影响军团的命运，但你不一样。走吧。”

languages.text: « Sergent, votre régiment a besoin de vous. Ma mort ne lui nuira pas, contrairement à la vôtre. Partez. »
languages.original_text: "Sergeant, your regiment needs you. My death will not affect its fate. Yours will. Go."

traits.locale_text: « Sergent, votre régiment a besoin de vous. Ma mort ne lui nuira pas, contrairement à la vôtre. Partez. »

languages.text: "Sergeant, Euer Regiment braucht Euch. Mein Tod hat keinen Einfluss auf sein Schicksal. Der Eure schon. Geht."
languages.original_text: "Sergeant, your regiment needs you. My death will not affect its fate. Yours will. Go."

traits.locale_text: "Sergeant, Euer Regiment braucht Euch. Mein Tod hat keinen Einfluss auf sein Schicksal. Der Eure schon. Geht."
